author: @kylehenderson6226

text:
This shit is now 10 years old... 

I was in elementary when this uploaded. Now I'm halfway through my senior year in highschool. Things have defiantly changed for the better or for the worst after an entire decade. This video is nothing special, but this is of course the the 10th year anniversary of a video from a bygone era of youtube. Back when things were more simple, yet more deep. Back before youtube became the corporate entity that punished people for taking they're time making good, interesting videos that don't satisfy the algorithm rather then rush out daily uploads, and shunned those who have the slightest edge. I'm not trying to say everything is a horrid distopia now. The past contained it's fair share of bullshit too. There's definitely still inspired content creators who still put creativity into they're videos. But it was the standard back then.

I know the person who made this probably won't read it since this channel seems inactive (unsurprising considering it has been a decade), but I made this comment as an anniversary message, looking back at how much things change in 10 years. I waited for a month to do this after I decided to rewatch it.
author: @KroutonCing

text:
Yeah, this is the same for me when it comes to YTPMV’s and stuff, growing up and looking back on this. The old times hold a very special place in your heart.

Happy 10th Anniversary, crazy chocolate man.
